reasoning: Koren, your power curve shows a clear lactate clearance limiter, especially with the 9.3% drop from 5 to 20 minutes. Your last ride indicates recovering, so we'll focus on a sustainable yet challenging effort. This workout simulates the demands of the Alpine Loop's key segment, preparing you to maintain a strong pace over the main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Alternating 6 minutes at 209W followed by 6 minutes at 242W, repeat 4 times

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
